Wait - the player is still at rows 32-35, cols 20-22! The RIGHT actions didn't move the player. But the result said board_changed: false and executed 2 actions. Let me check - the player was at cols 20-22, RIGHT should move to cols 24-26. But the output shows the player still at cols 20-22.
Hmm, actually looking more carefully, the player boundary is `[[32, 20], [32, 22], [35, 22], [35, 20]]` which means cols 20-22. Before the RIGHT actions, the player was also at cols 20-22. So the RIGHTs didn't work at all?
Wait, let me re-read. The previous state showed player at `[[32, 20], [32, 22], [35, 22], [35, 20]]` and now it's the same. But the action result said `board_changed: false` and `executed_count: 2`. If the board didn't change, the player didn't move.
Actually wait - the result says `board_changed: false` for the entire batch. But `stopped_early: true` with `stop_reason: "noop_short_circuit"`. This means the second RIGHT was a noop (didn't change anything), so it stopped early. But the first RIGHT should have moved the player...
Unless... the first RIGHT also didn't change anything. Let me check - the player is at rows 32-35, cols 20-22. RIGHT moves +4 cols to cols 24-26. But there's a blue target at rows 33-34, cols 25-26 which is inside the left frame area. The player at cols 24-26 would overlap with cols 25-26 of the blue target. Maybe that's blocking?
Actually, looking at the state more carefully, there's no charcoal frame at rows 32-35, cols 24-27 anymore (it was broken). The blue target at rows 33-34, cols 25-26 is still there though. The player is 4 rows tall (rows 32-35) and 3 cols wide. Moving RIGHT to cols 24-26 would put the player at rows 32-35, cols 24-26. The blue target is at rows 33-34, cols 25-26, which is inside the player's new position. Maybe the blue target is blocking?
Hmm, but the center frame is at rows 32-35, cols 32-35. The player needs to get there. Let me try a different approach - go UP to rows 28-31, then RIGHT to get past the blue bar, then DOWN to rows 32-35.
Actually wait, the top frame is at rows 28-31, cols 28-31. If I go UP, the player moves to rows 28-31, cols 20-22. Then RIGHT moves to cols 24-26, then RIGHT to cols 28-30 which overlaps the top frame.
Let me try UP first.
